title: Norwegian Barley Pilaf
description: A delicate, flavorful barley pilaf with a hint of malty sweetness, perfect for a light lunch.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a medium saucepan over medium heat.
Add the barley and pilaf, stir to combine.
Cook for 3-4 minutes, or until lightly toasted.
Add 2 cups of water, bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low.
Simmer, covered, for 15-20 minutes, or until the liquid has been absorbed.
Stir in chopped fresh herbs and season with salt.
Fluff with a fork and serve hot.
